g.title: acq.po_item:purchase_order->acq.purchase_order:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (purchase_order) REFERENCES acq.purchase_order(id) ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.po_item:fund_debit->acq.fund_debit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund_debit) REFERENCES acq.fund_debit(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.po_item:inv_item_type->acq.invoice_item_type:code
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (inv_item_type) REFERENCES acq.invoice_item_type(code) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.po_item:fund->acq.fund:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (fund) REFERENCES acq.fund(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: acq.invoice_item:po_item->acq.po_item:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (po_item) REFERENCES acq.po_item(id) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
